title: Places and Community Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person who helps sick people feel better.
rounds.answer: doctor
rounds.explanation: doctor: A person who helps sick people feel better.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A place where people solve problems fairly using the laws.
rounds.answer: court
rounds.explanation: court: A place where people solve problems fairly using the laws.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A door or way to go out of a place; to go out.
rounds.answer: exit
rounds.explanation: exit: A door or way to go out of a place; to go out.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.
rounds.answer: officer

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A school for older students and adults.
rounds.answer: college

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.
rounds.answer: village

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The doctor works at the hospital.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The sailor sails across the sea.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The court is next to the police station.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which question is written correctly?
rounds.answer: Do you like the market?
rounds.explanation: You takes do, she takes does, and a question word must be followed by the verb: Where is he going today?

rounds.prompt: Which sentence uses the simple present correctly?
choices: The market open at seven o'clock.
The doctor works at the hospital.
She visit her grandmother on Sunday.
rounds.answer: The doctor works at the hospital.
rounds.explanation: He, she and it add -s to the verb, so the other three sentences are all missing that ending.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence gives a reason with because?
choices: I like the market because it has fresh fruit.
The quiet village sits between green farms and tall trees.
rounds.answer: I like the market because it has fresh fruit.
rounds.explanation: Only this sentence joins a complete idea to its reason; the last option is not a full sentence at all.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Why does the community need older students to learn new jobs at the college?
choices: Because those students grow into the nurses, officers and builders the community needs.
Because only goats wander past the garden, while crowds fill the market.
Amal lives in a small village near Mount Meru, and her village is quiet.
rounds.answer: Because those students grow into the nurses, officers and builders the community needs.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Because those students grow into the nurses, officers and builders the community needs.

rounds.prompt: In “At the Market”, what two foods does the speaker buy?
choices: Because only goats wander past the garden, while crowds fill the market.
They visited the hospital first, and a kind nurse met them at the door.
The speaker buys bananas and rice at the busy market.
rounds.answer: The speaker buys bananas and rice at the busy market.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: The speaker buys bananas and rice at the busy market.

rounds.prompt: Where does Amal live, and is her village quiet or busy?
choices: Because people were resting inside the hospital, and noise would disturb them.
Amal lives in a small village near Mount Meru, and her village is quiet.
The speaker buys bananas and rice at the busy market.
rounds.answer: Amal lives in a small village near Mount Meru, and her village is quiet.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Amal lives in a small village near Mount Meru, and her village is quiet.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — My Community
rounds.target: In my community there is a ______.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3 — Guess the Place
Speaking 5 — Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Name your favourite place in the county centre and explain your choice with because.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We bought bananas at the market.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We used the back exit after the class.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We live in this county near the hills.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'college' mean in this unit?
choices: A school for older students and adults.
A person who helps sick people feel better.
A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.
rounds.answer: A school for older students and adults.
rounds.explanation: college: A school for older students and adults.

rounds.prompt: What does 'village' mean in this unit?
choices: A person who helps sick people feel better.
A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.
A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.
rounds.answer: A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.
rounds.explanation: village: A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.

rounds.prompt: What does 'officer' mean in this unit?
choices: A person who works on a boat or ship at sea.
A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.
A person who helps sick people feel better.
rounds.answer: A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.
rounds.explanation: officer: A person who helps keep people safe and makes sure rules are followed.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'garden'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: garden is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'border'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: border is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'hospital'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: hospital is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A person who works on a boat or ship at sea.
A place where doctors and nurses care for people who are sick or hurt.
A place where people solve problems fairly using the laws.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A place where people buy and sell food and other things.
A place where plants, flowers or vegetables grow.
A small group of homes in the countryside, smaller than a town.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: A part of a country that has its own towns and rules.
The name of the place where someone lives.
A person who helps sick people feel better.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: In the poem 'Places I Know', which place is called grand?
rounds.answer: the court
rounds.explanation: The poem gives busy to the market and saves grand for the court in the very same line.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Community Helpers Song': The _____ keeps you safe.
rounds.answer: officer
rounds.explanation: The song gives the sea to the sailor and the sick to the doctor, so only the officer keeps you safe.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence gives an instruction?
rounds.answer: Exit the hall quietly.
rounds.explanation: It opens with a base verb and leaves out the word you; the others are a statement, a question and a statement.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word names the person who helps sick people feel better?
rounds.answer: doctor
rounds.explanation: Only the doctor cares for sick people; a sailor works at sea, a market sells food and a border is a line on a map.

rounds.prompt: What does the word 'exit' mean?
choices: A line where two countries meet.
A school for older students and adults.
A person who works on a ship at sea.
A way to go out of a place.
rounds.answer: A way to go out of a place.
rounds.explanation: The other three options are the meanings of border, college and sailor.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Our Community': At the _____, people buy and sell food.
rounds.answer: market
rounds.explanation: The text pairs buying and selling with the market, not with a person, a home detail or a describing word.
